title: Bravely Second: End Layer Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Bravely Second: End Layer (2015) is a acclaimed jrpg title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Explore towns and dungeons, fight turn-based battles, level up, and advance the story.
